title: Hub Envelope
description: Common envelope fields for ziee-native model + assistant manifests. MCP server manifests do NOT extend this — they are strict server.json (which carries its own name/version fields).

$schema.description: URL of the JSON Schema this manifest claims to conform to. Informational.

name.description: Reverse-DNS canonical id, unique across sources. ziee-native entries use io.github.<contributor>/<leaf>; the part before the slash is the namespace, the part after is the leaf used for path layout.

version.description: Per-entry semver. Drives the per-row update signal in the installed view.

_meta.description: Namespaced provenance / extras. Reserved for a future phase.
